title: Live House CiRCLE
overview: In the hidden base of the band girls, live house "CiRCLE", which is used by several small bands, a storm is getting blown away!

title: Think Tank
overview: The number of customers is less than the number of members of Poppin'Party. Is this the crisis of disband?! They somehow managed to fire up the stage, but all the ideas are messy. Is something shining there?

title: Revolution
overview: The girls were seen flying in the sky. "Is it okay to look up?" The blue rose that blooms in the ground pierces through the darkness and then searches for a pair of black wings, which is the new possibilities of Roselia. That, is "revolution".

title: Rock n' Roll Baby
overview: Let's introduce these amazing members! Sisterly drummer! Udagawa Tomoe! Crybaby bassist! Uehara Himari! Self-pace guitarist! Aoba Moca! Cool vocalist! Mitake Ran! Ay! And I am~...!

title: Pastel＊Palettes' Swimsuit Commercial
overview: Newbie Idols ・ Commercial in Swimsuits! The girls who will be taking the challenge is the 5 girls from the topical idol band, "Pastel*Palettes"! Can these fresh and charming girls break through the difficult games and get their time to appeal?! The shocking moments can be anticipated too!

title: Welcome to Michelle Land!
overview: Michelle Land~♪ Kokoro is also happy with the cheerful music~~♪ It's lucky to see lots of different Michelle~♪ Everyone is smiling because of the attraction~♪ Come on! Everyone, hold your hands! (Yay~!) Come together~ To the paradise of music and smile~♪ Michelle~♪ Michelle~♪ Miche~lle~ La~nd~~↑↑♪

title: CiRCLE Joint Concert Conference
overview: A plan that was decided beforehand has finally starting to advance. The warriors have passed through all sorts of things to enter the conference room for the meeting. The joint concert is what they wanted to discuss, and all the bands are demanding their own desires. How does Kasumi think about it? Next episode, "CiRCLE Joint Concert Measures Meeting", everyone is going to project their own heart on the board.

title: Drummers Gotta Drum
overview: The last episode of GaRuPa Pico is about....? Finally a joint concert is about to happen... Although nothing has been decided, Kokoro also thinks that it is fun, so we have to work harder during the practice! Ah, this episode will be about the drummers go to family restaurant....What! Fuee... So nervous...

title: For the Love of Chocolate Cornets
overview: --the chance was trivial. I do not remember exactly how it was. Did I stay at home or went out and bought it? It was just delicious. I loved it. I thought it was like that. When I noticed about it, it had gradually become a habit. From 1 in a week to 1 in a day, and 1 in a day to 5 in a day. When I am eating Choco cornet, everything I can see became so beautiful! It makes me so happy!

title: What About the Garlic?
overview:
"Saburo is one of the most powerful food that can appeal into people's mind." We went to that place called Saburo Ramen. Eat. Eat. Eat. We eat the ramen in a speed of 180BPM high-speed dance rock. There is only me and ramen. In a world of only ramen and me.

"Rock and Saburo, what makes them together?"

There is a moment that I thought like that. "Thank you for the treat." It is something important. With such a sense of satisfaction. We bowed to the shopkeeper lightly and left the shop. That's all for the report.

title: Hello, Happy Sky Jam
overview: The sky is so blue and the clouds are so white. The ultramarine blue has filled your vision. So thirsty. Due to the noise of the wind, I cannot hear anything. The things are scattering out from the bag. This is so throbbing. The sunshine is so dazzling. Those water that is not good for body. Those smiles. With the counts from the drumsticks, Hello Happy Sky Jam, start!

title: Babanbo, Hear My Prayers
overview: Unbobo, Babanbo. Unbobo, Babanbo. Ungaro, Hoganga. Babanbo, Nnbobo. Bobon, Babanbo. Nnbo, Nnbaba. Unbobo, Babanbo! Unbobo, Babanbo!

title: Twinkling Joyful Shopping District Frenzy Bushido Party
overview: "Twinkle Twinkle☆Party"... "Michelle and Her Merry Friends"... Shopping District Naming Right... "The Dark Abyss Frenzied Party"... "Bushido"... Uhm... We'll decide the title later...!

title: Hello, Happy's Winter Mountain Hike
overview:
"BanG Dream! Girls Band Party!☆PICO" is receiving very good comments so we are releasing the 2nd season! This time they will get out from CiRCLE and have a grand adventure?! Although this time everyone from Hello, Happy World! go for a hiking at a mountain, the brisk wind is so strong and everyone is very hungry!?

Although Michelle's fur is so soft, fluffy and warm, Fuee... We will be frozen if we continue like this~

title: Part Time Job
overview: Speaking of the basic for working in a convenience store, it is about giving a pleasant greeting!

title: Poppin' Shuffle
overview:
I am Toyama Kasumi, class 1-A from Hanasakigawa Girls' High School! Today, members of Poppin' Party are having training in the basement! But, something happened when we fell down from the stairs-

"Ehhhhh! Our bodies, were switched!!"

This is unbelievable, but surely this is also a trial for us to let us shine! Let's do our best, Arisa♪

title: Pastel＊Stroll
overview: Always vibrant with shining colors♪ Today's Pastel*Stroll will be at the Shopping Street. We also go to some popular shops to try out the exquisite cake and the famous bun ♪ The girl which is active in CiRCLE also appear unexpectedly! Alright! Let's go for the walk!

title: Basement Maze
overview: You wander into the rift of the basement. This is a maze where adventurers gather for wealth and fame, known as "Basement maze". You must proceed by your will and unravel the mystery of the world. Now, believe in your friends, believe in yourself, and walk the road. There is no turning back. Now your adventure has already begun!

title: CiRCLE's Collapse
overview:
"CiRCLE will be closed this year." ---Several weeks after the announcement. The time for the shop closing is gradually, but definitely approaching. However, the girls will not get convinced by it. Grab your hand, combine our power, and raise the voice.

With our power... We will stop the closing of CiRCLE!

title: Truth-Seeing Demon Eye
overview: To spend our holidays, I went to ski with everyone and stayed overnight. I got tired at skiing at the slopes and the wind was strong. By the time I got back to the pension the snow grew stronger, and I can hardly wait for the warm soup and delicious rice~! I am sure everyone will have a nice chat tonight! However, I never thought that such a thing would happened.

title: That Performance Sure Would Be Exciting
overview: There is only little time left until the joint concert. Not even a second should be wasted to do a perfect performance. Today's practice will be more severe than usual. Oh, the little thing over there is...

title: Welcome to Michelle Cafe!
overview: "Munch" "Uun, tasty!" I see, it is the croquette from Kitazawa's butcher shop. Do not despise it as a collaboration menu, please. the breads used are also in good quality. I felt hungry and have a try on it, but this is not as quality as I thought. "Sips" Uun, the coffee is delicious too. Are you sure this is not instant coffee? So that is why the price is like that, heh.

title: Pastel's Pajama Party
overview: It is almost party season for this year♪ Speaking of grouping together to have fun, a karaoke party is also one of the solid choices, but I wanted to be with my close friends and have a pajama party once! Stay around the sweets, unlike usual, play until late or haveing girls' talk... I am really looking forward to it♪ There is no doubt that it will become one of the memories! I hope so♪ Ok, let's go~!

title: Twin Rhythm
overview: Twins. Known as two children born at the same time in the same mother's womb, which is one of the phenomena that multiple fetus were born. It has been said that there is a scientifically unexplainable phenomenon between twins since ancient times. Sharing the same mind even though they were far away from each other, synchronization of physical actions... The mystery of the twins is remains unknown, and we are getting nearer to the mystery.

title: Christmas Eve Surprise
overview: Prior to the closing live concert, the member's spirit are growing. As the repairing of the live house carried out by Marina is going well, the members come out with a fantastic idea. Episode 25, "Christmas Eve Surprise". This time as well, CiRCLE CiRCLE!

title: Reconstructed
overview: Due to the collapse of CiRCLE, there is no hope for the joint live anymore. The band members are grieving and Marina has lost her job. Staying in the heavy air, Kasumi heard the "Star Beat" again. "I don't want to give up..." CiRCLE's final sparkling and exciting live starts now!

title: Live House "CiRCLE"
overview:
Band girls' hidden popular base, live house "CiRCLE". Kasumi and her friends are in good health today. Meanwhile, a mysterious protrusion on the floor was discovered... ?

An everyday bowlful of trouble starts once again!

title: Poppin'Pastry
overview:
English Bread. German Bread. French Bread. But there is no Poppin'Party Bread, "Poppin'Pastry"! Therefore, I have no choice but to make it!

Toyama Kasumi, the girl who aims to be the star of a band, proud of the world's bread for Poppin'Party by Poppin'Party.

This is the story about the making of the "Poppin'Pastry!"

title: Lisa Coutre
overview: Cute no matter what she wears. Looks good no matter what. Always dreaming for that kind of girl. So... walk the runway dressed up like a glittering model. Lisa Collection 2020, Now Open!

title: Himari SOS!
overview:
Chastise! Your own body!

Squeeze! Until you won't sweat anymore!

Imagine! The ideal figure!

Unto another set! Let's go!

title: Pastel＊Desert
overview: When you hear the word Oasis, you think of a water spring in the middle of the desert! I imagine that, but in general, it is a lush area in a dry environment. The water comes from various sources such as groundwater, rivers, and melting snow. By the way, I heard that oasis water is difficult to drink with hard water, but I wonder if it's true. I've wanted to try it for a while...

title: Misaki Madness
overview:
Take off Michelle. I did my best today. Let's go to sleep.

... I can't calm down. I wonder what to wear again. I want to be Michelle. Shall I wear it for a while? But I just took it off. Let's sleep already. I'm sure it will go away in the morning.

... No good, I can't sleep. Let's wear it now! It feels natural it calms me down. Michelle... yeah, Michelle. I am Michelle.

title: New Epithets
overview: It's cool to have a nickname or two. The opponent's Four Heavenly Kings, that appear in mangas about talented people, similar to that of a Sengoku Warlord. Looking strong, it's easy to know who you are. I think it's nice to have a cute girl.

title: Cardfight!! Sister!
overview: Imagine... You both love your older sisters. Close your eyes, you can clearly picture it. Cute, some are missing, but it's reliable... the image of your sisters. Are you ready? Stand up! Sister!

title: Puzzle☆Pico
overview:
That's different from the usual CiRCLE...?

This is the world of Puzzle Pico composed of colorful cubes.

Join the same band members together and use the Miracle Jam to do a Feeling Pop!

Everyone seems to enjoy their time having coffee and croquettes.

Rimi-rin, give me one more chocolate cornet~!

title: Hanazono Street Live
overview:
Amplifier, check. Guitar, check. Smile, check.

Hanazono street live starts now!

title: Under the Tea
overview:
Darkness. Darkness. Eternal Darkness.

This room, where seven girls sit with their knees abutted, is very stuffy. The occasional squeaking metal noises and the smell of petrol filling the nasal cavity makes the atmosphere even more serious.

To change the atmosphere, Kokoro speaks: "Let's have a tea time!"

Darkness TEA TIME starts now!

title: Girls Band☆Times
overview:
That thing arrives punctually every night.

Who wrote it? Where does it come from?

And why is it always publish the intelligence only the person herself involved knows about?

Everything about this is a mystery.

Well. The night of today is drawing near.

Girls Band☆Times is reaching you.

title: CiRCLE Customer Attracting Conference
overview:
CiRCLE, the live house that once flourished!

After being surrounded by a stone-made labyrinth, its glory in the past is nowhere to be seen!

At that moment, the girls from the bands gathered together again!

Next time in Garupa☆Pico!"CiRCLE Customer Attracting Conference"!!

"I'll be saving CiRCLE."

title: Got a New Haircut?
overview:
"Hello!"

"Hello!"

"There are no customers today?"

"Yeah!"

"And it's so dark outside~"

"Yeah!"

"How can anyone come here?"

"Yeah!"

"Let's do our best at today's rehearsal, too!"

"Yeah!"

"Okay, thank you."

title: Roselia Online
overview:
There's a rock giant standing in front of you. It has a huge body of 10 metres tall, is about to swing down its big fist, and has a burning-hot body.

You guys can either fight it or run away at a glance.

title: Noodle! Journey!
overview: Don't slurp noodles! Noodle factory's zundo ramen fats and soups. Lasting thick "naruto" steam. Hey, I want more chili oil. Small rice ON, roasted pork fillet, good fortune! Eating everything from all extra servings. noodlee!journey! The assorted noodles slurping. Let's eat one more!

title: Magic Morphin' Pastel✽Rangers
overview: Hatred, envy... Evil nesting in people's heart. "Waruizo", the monster that feeds on them! CiRCLE, the secret organization of justice, entrusted five girls with powers to counter Waruizo who plans on conquering the town! And thus, the idol unit "Pastel*Palettes" formed the group "Pastel*Rangers", a group of girls warriors who fight with the power of magic and music. They will fight today as well...!

title: Michellebot, Go!
overview: The future that is about to come. Band girls had welcomed an unprecedented time of prosperity. However, behind the glorious peace, two forces go against each other. "Kitazawa Butcher Shop", a shop loved by the locals with budget-friendly prices. On the other hand, live house "CiRCLE" assembled the band girls of justice, "Tsurumaki Foundation" and controlling the strongest robot "Michellebot" is Kokoro Tsurumaki! "Michellebot, Go!"

title: Mashiro Station
overview:
103: Anonymous Live House:  Nice to meet you! I'd like to ask you something, is that okay?

104: Anonymous Live House:  Go ahead

105: Anonymous Live House:  ｷﾀ━━━━━━(ﾟ∀ﾟ)━━━━━━ !!!!!

106: Anonymous Live House:  Earlier, I was heading for an appointment by train, but this looks a little strange.

107: Anonymous Live House:  Continue

108: Anonymous Live House:  I was a little sleepy, and when I came to, I noticed I stopped at an unmanned station...

109: Anonymous Live House:  For real?

title: Tuna
overview: The waves sway the ship back and forth. A school of fish glittering on the surface of the water. Fired up feelings. Checked the correct weight of the rod. The wife's undone expression. The Buddhist's priest delighted figure comes to mind. Heiyasa eiyasa, eiyasa hoi. Let's aim for tuna today too.

title: Kaoru Onstage
overview:
―――A long time ago, an elderly couple picked up a peach that was big as them. The ball-shaped baby that hatched from it was named "Momotarou" and taken care of by the elderly couple. As time passed and Momotarou became a fine man, he is starting to finally realize his grand fate...

You will be surprised by the new take on this classic fairy tale, especially the ending scene! The expectation-breaking actress Seta Kaoru's moving performance will begin now...!

title: The Toyama Expedition
overview: A mysterious jungle suddenly enveloped the city! And a mysterious feral child lives there...! Is it a new kind of beast that plunges the neighborhood into depths of fear!? Or is it a primitive man that has survived since the ancient times!? Readying ourselves to solve the mystery, we decided to enter the jungle! As we are about to set foot, a mysterious black reflection appeared before us!

title: Maruyama Channel
overview:
*Recording Start

Alright! Hello, everyone! Blooming with radiance, this is Maruyama Aya from the Maruyama Channel!

*Introduction

Now that summer's over, it's starting to get colder again~. On my way home, I got the urge to eat something really warm! Just kidding. Do you guys get those kinds of thoughts, too? And with that, here's what I'm gonna do this time!

*Theme Announcement

Chukuchukuchukuchukuchuku, sphere~! I'm gonna compare these meat buns I bought from the convenience store!

(She spent the rest of the time piling up and sorting the meat buns different ways)

title: One Lump or Two?
overview:
For some reason, whenever I go to a retro-style café, I order a cup of coffee instead of the usual black tea, I sit at the back of the café for no reason, and I open my laptop even though I don't have any work.

But that kind of situation makes me feel really calm.

"Miss, can you please refrain from using the computer?"

title: She's Missing
overview: Buildings right after another building. The closed road to "CiRCLE". What was the building for? What is the meaning of the excavated earthenware from CiRCLE's basement? Is it time to reveal the mysteries? All the while, she suddenly disappears.

title: The Star Beat
overview: No one can reach CiRCLE. However, for some reason, Kasumi is in CiRCLE, with the mysterious guitar-shaped excavated earthenware. While everyone is confused, Kasumi talks about an underground ruins and proposed something...! A sparkling and heart-pounding performance from everyone is about to begin!

title: The Warring Girls Band Period
overview: It's the warring times of girls bands! Seven dominating forces around "CiRCLE" are fighting fierce faction battles, aiming to unify the world! The days of battles, to wash blood with blood, start again!

title: Hiking Hiya!
overview: Wow! Ideal hiking weather! But! Don't take the mountain weather for granted! It was just sunny until now. And before I realized it, we were surrounded by fog... It is important to enjoy the picnic so be careful and take all precautionary measures.

title: In the Satisfaction of Sportsmanship
overview:
Let's pledge!

We, the band girls and all concerned, will uphold sportsmanship, to sweat comfortably, and to have fun fair-and-square! This is our pledge! This has been Toyama Kasumi, CiRCLE's representative!

title: Hey! Spring of Emotion
overview: The melancholic events that makes daily living interesting, welcome to the Spring of Emotion. At Spring of Emotion, events shared by my childhood friends that makes me glad to live, "Emoina" will comment on how to become emo. Let's start! First of all, this is "Emoina".

title: Find Jennifer!
overview: Terrible! Jennifer-chan has gone missing! Eh? How about a call...? Jennifer-chan can't just leave that easily, what are you talking about? ... Then, how about a mail? So, Jennifer-chan? Think seriously! I can't do this! Anyway, I'll go searching for it! My Jennifer-chan!

title: Produce☆Galaxy
overview: The rising of an enormous chain. A one-man business in distress. In order to save a certain ramen shop, the able producer CHU² and friends take action in this ramen consulting story. "Produce☆Galaxy", starting!

title: Himari's SNS WAR
overview:
ひまり@Afterglow

@Himari_afterglow 2mins ago

My new favorite convenience store recently!

The rabbit's shape is cute and it's super delicious~!

I will buy it on my way home from band practice.

I am worried about this month's allowance... but it's super delicious~!

Comments 0 「」13　♡12

title: THE Pastel＊Palettes DISH
overview: The five members of Pastel＊Palettes are going around Japan trying and challenging various things! From experimental body stretching challenges to full-scale challenges that are on par with professionals, they will make the impossible possible! Revalidate the girls bands' virtue through said challenges! There are a lot, such as "PasuPare Official Tour Street" "PasuPare Island" "PasuPare 0-Yen Cafe" "World's Most Delicious Omurice" "PasuPare Desert"!

title: Running Down a Dream
overview: Marathon... It's one of the competitions at the school event. Some are physical tests, some are mental tests, others test friendships. Come, sweat out our youth! Run, cut through the winds! Never mind the muscle pain comes next day!

title: The Black La Vie en Note
overview: Udagawa Ako, an ordinary high school student and member of the girl band "Roselia", by a strange coincidence, comes upon a mysterious note giving off a strange aura. The notebook contains poems about a certain theme. Ako thought them to be revelations of God. And with such, she decided to lead the band girls as the Goddess of the New World. The world is shaken greatly, by Ako who had inherited the notebook's will!

title: Mashiro the Worrywart
overview: Yesterday's live was very fun... After all, I love Morfonica...! But, after that day, everyone's seem to be distant...? H-have I done something wrong...?!

title: Jerky Adventure
overview: The more you chew, the richer and deeper the taste that will overflow infinitely. There is a golden bird that makes a "nest" with high quality beef jerky. It is the jerky era. The era of infinite exploration of jerky!

title: Seven Bands in a Joint Concert of Dreams!
overview: Poppin'Party, Afterglow, Pastel*Palettes, Roselia, Hello, Happy World!, Morfonica, and RAISE A SUILEN will together prepare for the dream joint live! Great success is certain! Sparkling, heart-pounding, and everyone is happy!!... isn't it?

title: Training Camp Sonata
overview: Roselia band members decided to hold a training camp, seeking growth. On their way, they encountered a heavy downpour. They were soaked by the time they arrived at the venue. Nobody else was there. The silence was eery. What is the fate that awaits them there...?

title: Poppin'Moni Movie
overview: Good evening... It's time for the PopiMoni Roadshow. Is tonight's order a bloody murder drama? Or spine-chilling paranormal? We have a large array of pieces to satisfy our audience. Come and enjoy the horror masterpiece tonight...

title: Happy, Happy Vacation♪
overview: The glistening sun! The clear sea! "It's a holiday on a private island today!" Everyone in Hello, Happy World! is dressed in cute swimsuits and in high spirits! "I wonder what to play next!"

title: Chocolate Cornet Embezzlement
overview: Kurata Mashiro, the client involved in an unreasonable case. Her Counsel Toyama Kasumi stands up to her defense to clear her of charges! Is she guilty or not...? It's unsure but let's just say it! "Objection!"

title: Kitty Kitty Time
overview: Cat — domesticated species belonging to the Felidae family. They live independently and are oftentimes unfriendly towards their owners. But once a relationship of mutual trust is built out of deep attachment, they'll occasionally display sweet gestures that are irresistibly cute, won't they? Nyan~

title: Girls Band Party Masterpiece Theatre Taederella
overview: Once upon a time, in a certain place, lived a daughter named Taederella. Everyday, Taederella was made to work hard by her Stepmother and older stepsisters. Taederella doesn't mind that, as long as she's happy and living. On a certain day, a proclamation regarding a prince from the large castle reached their place. This is where the story begins...

title: Tomoe at the Arcade
overview: Udagawa Tomoe, the usually normal high school girl. But once she sees a drums, her passion awakens!!! With powerful rivals, each brimming with their own quirks and using numerous killer techniques, a deadly fight ensues! See for yourself, the roar of Tomoe's soul!

title: Happy Samba Carnival
overview:
The device was invented by the Tsurumaki Foundation. Place a thing in a room. Switch on the control panel. The thing will be transferred to another room.

※Only those who are given administrator privileges can operate. Transfer of living things is prohibited. Take caution to not make any mistakes when booting up the device.

title: CiRCLE Kindergarten
overview: An ordinary kindergarten that can be found anywhere. Where children's lively voices always reverberates. Where everyone have fun while playing♪ Come! Let's play today! Play in the sand? Play house? Play singing? Everyone, let's get along well and let's play together!

title: Thank You
overview: If you overuse your throat, like singing in a loud voice, the vocal cords may caught inflammation and it'd be difficult to even make a sound. As much as possible, refrain from vocalization, avoid stimulants, and take care of your throat.

title: Seven Band Joint Concert Meeting
overview: Come! Let's all perform together! Eh...? Where are you, Marina? I want to discuss something related to the venue preparation! On that note, I haven't seen her very much lately...

title: Beyond the Distant Sky
overview: With Marina's resignation, which can no longer be averted, CiRCLE's survival is being threatened! In such a hopeless reality, they turn their face downwards. Among them, as one would expect, that lone girl stood up...!? The best sparkling and heart-pounding live concert begins!
